title: Raat Ka Rahasya
description: A seasoned detective named Vikram Singh investigates a mysterious disappearance in old Delhi. As clues emerge from forgotten alleys he realizes the case connects to his own haunted past.

title: The Silent Shore
description: Two strangers meet on a deserted Goan beach after missing the last ferry. Stranded overnight they share secrets they have never told anyone and discover that loneliness can end in unexpected places.

title: Kaala Saya
description: A village near Madurai is plagued by a shadow that moves against the light. A folklore professor arrives to debunk the myth but quickly realizes some stories are not meant to be explained.

title: Naya Safar
description: After losing his startup Rohan boards a random train with no destination. Conversations with fellow passengers across three days rebuild his belief that failure is just a detour not a dead end.

title: The Last Recipe
description: An aging chef in Chennai receives a letter from her estranged daughter days before her restaurant closes forever. She spends one final night cooking every dish that marked their broken relationship.

title: Andhere Mein Roshni
description: A power outage traps five strangers in a Mumbai apartment elevator. As hours pass each person reveals a secret and one of them may not be who they claim to be.

title: Valaiyum Vaanam
description: A radio jockey in Coimbatore falls for a listener who calls every night but refuses to meet. When she finally tracks him down the truth is more complicated than a simple love story.

title: Second Chance
description: Maya was fired from three jobs in a year. This is the story of how she turned rejection letters into a business that now employs fifty people and why she keeps every rejection on her office wall.

title: Bhoot Bangla
description: Four college students dare each other to spend a night in an abandoned haveli in Rajasthan. By midnight only three are certain they are still alone in the building.

title: Ek Chup Sau Sukh
description: A retired schoolteacher in Varanasi decides to stop speaking for thirty days. His silence forces his family to listen to each other for the first time in years.

title: The Algorithm
description: A data scientist discovers a pattern in missing persons reports that her company's AI flagged and buried. Following the trail puts her career and her safety at risk.

title: Mazhai Naalil
description: A florist and an architect are paired by a wedding planner as temporary partners for a destination event in Ooty. Neither expects a week of monsoon rain and close quarters to change everything.

title: Wapas
description: After fifteen years abroad Priya returns to her hometown in Bihar with a degree and big plans. What she finds is messier and more beautiful than anything she imagined from a distance.

title: Whispers in the Ward
description: A night nurse on a pediatric ward begins hearing a child humming in the empty room at the end of the hall. The hospital records show that room has been sealed for eleven years.

title: Teen Dost
description: Three childhood friends reunite at a school reunion after twenty years. Over one long evening they confront the lie that split them apart and decide whether the friendship is worth saving.

title: The Confession
description: A priest receives a confession from someone who claims they will commit a crime tomorrow. Bound by silence he must find a way to stop it without breaking the seal of the confessional.

title: Kaalai Mazhai
description: A young farmer in Thanjavur refuses to sell his land to a real estate developer despite mounting debt. The story of one monsoon season that changed the fate of his entire village.

title: Night Shift
description: Three nurses on the overnight shift in a Chennai hospital share stories during the quiet hours between 2 and 4 AM. What they reveal changes how each one sees the next morning.

title: Sahara
description: A travel journalist is assigned a story on solo female travel. Her reluctant guide is a man who stopped believing in journeys after a personal loss. The desert has other plans.

title: The Puppeteer
description: A street puppeteer in Thanjavur notices his puppet moving on its own during performances. When he investigates the puppet's origin he uncovers a story of grief and revenge spanning two generations.

title: Boundary Line
description: Two athletes competing for a single Olympic spot are forced to train together after their coach is hospitalised. Someone is sabotaging the training and each one suspects the other.

title: Ghar Ki Yaad
description: A migrant worker in Surat records voice messages for his daughter every evening but never sends them. This is the story told through those unsent messages over one year.

title: Uyir Meetpu
description: A marine biologist returns to her coastal hometown to fight a corporation threatening the reef. She has thirty days a limited budget and one ally: the fishermen who taught her to swim.

title: The Inheritance
description: A woman inherits her grandfather's house and finds a locked room containing letters addressed to a name that matches hers but written sixty years before she was born.

title: Ek Baar Phir
description: Two ex-colleagues who ended badly are booked into the same work retreat by mistake. Forced proximity over four days in the hills reopens questions neither of them had finished answering.
